Thanks for the contribution. Please confirm each item below before
requesting review. CONTRIBUTING.md has the long-form policy.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing the change and why it is needed. -->

## Related issue

<!-- Link to an open issue. For non-trivial changes, open an issue first. -->

Closes #

## Changes

<!-- Bullet list of user-visible changes. Keep PRs surgical. -->

-

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` clean
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` clean
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run size` under the size budget
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` passes (if the change touches the iframe surface)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (if user-visible)
- [ ] README / SECURITY.md updated (if behaviour or surface changed)
- [ ] No emojis, em dashes, or en dashes in code, UI, or docs

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything specific to look at, design choices to flag, etc. -->
